content:
alexcrichton opened PR #13188 from alexcrichton:new-msrv to bytecodealliance:main:

Some minor clean-ups/adjustments in a few location using niceties added in 1.93.

  • Explain why this change is needed. If the details are in an issue already,
    this can be brief.

fitzgen submitted PR review:

The debug formatting from_fn stuff is such a nice clean up
fitzgen added PR #13188 Use some APIs first available in Rust 1.93 to the merge queue.
fitzgen removed PR #13188 Use some APIs first available in Rust 1.93 from the merge queue.
